steps.title: Identify the relative clause structure
steps.content: The blank is in a relative clause introduced by “that,” which refers to “systems” (plural subject). A transitive verb is needed before “oxygen.”

steps.title: Apply the rule for verb tense
steps.content:
To describe what something characteristically does, use simple present tense that agrees with the subject. “Produce” (simple present, plural) correctly describes the systems' function. “Are producing,” “produced,” and “have produced” use the wrong tense or aspect for this context.

This matches choice C — C is correct.
